title: Refund Policy
content: Customers can request a refund within 7 days of delivery if the item is unused, undamaged, and returned with the original packaging. Refunds are processed after the warehouse confirms the return.

title: Return Policy
content: Returns are accepted within 10 days for damaged, defective, or incorrect items. The support team must approve the request before the customer sends the item back.

title: Delivery Delay
content: If delivery is delayed by more than 5 business days beyond the promised date, the customer may request status review, replacement, or escalation.

title: Cancellation Policy
content: Orders can be cancelled before they are shipped. Once the order is marked as dispatched, cancellation is not possible and the customer should use the return process after delivery.

title: Replacement Policy
content: A replacement can be issued if the product arrives damaged, missing parts, or not matching the product description. Replacement requests should include clear photos when possible.

title: Warranty Policy
content: Electronics and appliances carry a 1-year warranty against manufacturing defects. The warranty does not cover accidental damage, misuse, or unauthorised repairs.

title: Payment Issue
content: If payment was deducted but the order was not created, the customer should wait 24 hours for automatic reconciliation or contact support with the transaction ID.

title: Account Access
content: Customers who cannot access their account should reset the password first. If the issue continues, support can verify the registered email and unlock the account.
